name: Amber Tail Adventure
short_description: There's only You, the brave Sergio Fox, the parcel and the destination point!
detailed_description:
Nobody:
Literally nobody:
Me:

HEY! WANNA ASS-BLOWING DARK SOULS BULLET-HELL TOP-DOWN PUZZLE?!
- TAKE THIS!!!

There's only You, the brave Sergio Fox, the parcel and the destination point!

Everything else musn't bother you, especially:

  • 30 mind blowing levels!
  • More than 32 bloody enemy types!!
  • 3, Hard as a Rock, Bosses!!!

It's to dangerous to go alone! Take these:

  • Speed up - Boosts your speed
  • Vigilance- To see the bullet's traces
  • Slow Mo - Slows the time down
  • Switch off - Turns off all the turrets
